title: Bedrock Tools
description: You want bedrock as block? How about obsidian and bedrock tools and armor? You have them all!
body:
Yes, obsidian armor is a very old concept. What about bedrock armor? What about bedrock tools? Yes there are few other mods out there with same concept but each has their own problems.

This mod originally was made for my kid to play with. It's a little bit on the OP side of the spectrum but hey, we can all have fun.

You have obsidian tools, all of them. Axe, Hoe, Pickaxe, Shovel and Sword. The special ones are pickaxe and sword. If you want to break bedrock and get bedrock block or the end portal frame, use the obsidian pickaxe. If you want to get extra loot killing enderman and wither skeleton, use the sword. The armor set each adds one of the vanilla effects to the player. The intention is to have easy life under the water specially around monuments! Oh I forgot, each tool has 3500 durabilities however, if you break the bedrock with the pickaxe, each block will cost 100 durabilities. Other blocks are just fine.

The bedrock tools are really op. They each have 60 thousand durabilities! The pickaxe can break bedrock and end portal fame with each block costing 100 durability. Other blocks are normal and cost only 1. The sword is like the obsidian one but with little bit extra loot dropage. Did I forgot to mention, the bedrock sword will oneshot kill zombies, skeletons, spiders, creepers, and even enderman. Unfortunately, you have to hit wither with more extra hits. But still, killing dragon is a little easier than going into fight with other swords. Oh I forgot again, the warden has huge health. Even with bedrock sword, you will have to hit him more than 20 times I think (didn't try to be honest, you can risk it lol). Each piece of bedrock armor gives different effect to player, specially the leggings will give you creative flight. Have fun using them.

God I have such a bad memory, with your boots equipped, don't be affraid of looking into enderman's eyes, you are really invisible now!
